textByHashes.8c391d0edd2264076772e4e84f2d956594cf025e: Git back ter work, ye young varmint! There's treasure in them walls, and it's not gonna mine itself while ye stand here yappin'.
textByHashes.4c36220ef2550ee967ce13a5277306ab8b105cb6: Git ahold of yer pickaxe, find a vein of ore, and set to work. If ye got a bit of skill, ye'll have a pocket o' pay- dirt in no time.
textByHashes.1693e0956d53287d25d583e2b16218f814d50308: I've built me a contraption to wash the pay-dirt. Just drop yer pay-dirt in the hopper, an' wait fer it at the other end.
textByHashes.24f6e085271598ec834bf62a36804532577df1da: I won't charge ye fer usin' my contraption, but ye'd better fix it yerself when it breaks. A good whack with a hammer usually settles it.
textByHashes.2362623d3d76ccfce160b352e64c1ac8eca47aaf: Now will ye be gettin' to work now, or are ye gonna keep yappin' like a doggone galoot?
textByHashes.60cf09f4fe35506c2eef080bb04d579681299ccd: If ye've found yerself some golden nuggets in this 'ere mine, I'll do you a swap, yeah.
textByHashes.d6f0d32aafb1e84193de6a9a87668a23f4511de5: Why, I'm Percy. Prospector Percy, the roughest, toughest, gruffest miner in the land. I've been pannin' fer gold since I were a young-un, and here's where I've struck it lucky.
textByHashes.ec57bd798616dbb8c0f2a2a4c117aab0791b2e56: Don't ye give me any of yer lip, ye dern varmint! Young'uns these days got no respect.
textByHashes.30c961e7f6b70b86f56b4787991bbaf6a7fce307: This here's the richest seam of ore I've found in all my days. After I built a contraption for washing the pay- dirt, the dwarves let me run things down here.
textByHashes.94212680c9d1c58b6d29a114e381938d2bc48e95: Now, have ye any more idjit questions, or are ye ready to do some real work?
textByHashes.12508b83d756f149ef7c36f96269a9b3b3f6a8cb: If ye've got level 57 Mining, ye could pay to use my restricted mine, up the ladder. 100 nuggets gives unlimited access.
textByHashes.dc235d6a0bff9d01a027851f81dff2654c900837: How would ye like it if the sack were bigger? I'll let ye have more ore in there if ye pays me 200 nuggets.
textByHashes.8eba5e44c46c7dc34cff39e0cf0e8225811d7642: I can give ye access to a special hopper in the restricted mine for 50 nuggets, but you'll need access to the restricted mine first.
textByHashes.66dffa17f5114fd4c3b27968f6e79a38f749d019: Right, ye can go up there whenever ye likes. Just behave yerself, or my Ma will tan yer hide.
textByHashes.cb6c183a3f4cb2a5253e4588a0f81948634f46f4: Ye'll need level 57 Mining first. An' don't think ye can fool me with yer potions and fancy stat-boosts. Get yer level up for real.
textByHashes.533dae386286a2d8950ed7a3bc9671e6347631cf: That'll be 100 nuggets. If ye ain't got enough, ye'd better do some more mining - that's how ye gets stuff round here!
textByHashes.25f57d3ed9be0f259337529e11976685c94e4560: That'll be 200 nuggets. If ye ain't got enough, ye'd better do some more mining - that's how ye gets stuff round here!
textByHashes.eca7ea66cbc3dcdf8d49abf9600cf13146286ac7: Ye can already climb the ladder to the restricted mine. But how would ye like it if the sack were bigger? I'll let ye have more ore in there if ye pays me 200 nuggets.
textByHashes.b67495273cf9549d80b1c6d4295d03a4d25797dd: I can give ye access to a special hopper in the restricted mine for 50 nuggets, it connects to the hopper down here.
textByHashes.1da2c6da8cf4ff9e3b0f5d93b59e81dbf7be3d04: Ye can now use that fancy new hopper in the restricted mine.
textByHashes.278c5ff161c6677dab598416cee68c0216543b6f: Well, now, I think ye've got everything already. Ye can already go climb the ladder to the restricted mine, ye've got the bigger sack capacity too and ye have access to that restricted hopper.
textByHashes.9e6d375d3c9e9a1db14fe8887872e6a0319e94a6: That'll be 50 nuggets. If ye ain't got enough, ye'd better do some more mining - that's how ye gets stuff round here!
textByHashes.ccfdd33e348bde065720ab262a5ea9283267ca8b: Well, now, I think ye've got everything already. Ye can already go climb the ladder to the restricted mine, and ye've got the bigger sack capacity too.
textByHashes.aafb95ca6310d9ed53b3eb9dd49abf808e6d6dbb: Oi, git yerself out of that hole! It's not safe in there.
textByHashes.2d27127a382df9a274289420d5353865c38ccefa: I need you to answer this for me.
textByHashes.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
textByHashes.d4b12bb58e5de9d4949e143ad973d433223a738d: How can that be? Go check again!
textByHashes.a9537fe609b87a62519710d97b36765e0b19113b: We got us a jammed wheel!
textByHashes.646f628bbc43027e7c02ba72ab23f7a04f96e596: Git yer hammer an' fix that wheel!
textByHashes.68a63738981aa6bab44b9f501af1ff14c440ec60: Git yer hammer an' fix them wheels!
